tool_args: Mesonet starts 2022, Lane was 2018 — must use historical_station_values (monthly)
tool_result_summary: Pivoted to monthly historical data since mesonet can't see 2018

tool_args: SELECT station_id, value FROM historical_station_values WHERE date='2018-08-01' AND datatype='rainfall' ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 15
tool_result_summary: Top station 140.5: 2166mm (85.3in). Top 5 all exceeded 2000mm. All Big Island windward stations.
Aug 2018 is a dramatic outlier: max 2166mm (next highest 1403mm in 2016), avg 478mm (typical ~120mm)

tool_args: Compute Lane excess: Aug 2018 minus average August (excluding 2018) per station
tool_result_summary: Top excess: station 277 at 1700mm (66.9in), station 140.5 at 1691mm (66.6in). 23 stations exceeded 1500mm excess.

tool_args: Compare to published 50-58 inch storm totals
tool_result_summary: Monthly proxy overstates by ~15-30% because it includes non-Lane August rain and can't isolate the Aug 22-26 window. Directionally correct.
